subject: How do I reset my password?
body: Hi, I forgot my password and cannot log in. Can you help me reset it?
Can you show me how to integrate Slack?

name: Bob Builder
subject: Billing question
body: I was charged twice for the Professional plan this month. Please help.

subject: Feature request: Gantt charts
body: It would be great to have Gantt chart visualization for project timelines.
I need to export all my data. How can I do that?

name: Dana
subject: Cannot connect my Google Drive
body: I tried linking Google Drive but it says authentication failed.
